stemHtml: Whilst performing a take-off in icing conditions, the aircraft nose feels heavy, and it takes a long time to rotate. What could have caused this?

options.a: Anti-icing fluid has built up between the elevator and horizontal stabiliser.
options.b: The control cables connecting the control column to the elevator have torn.
options.c: The ailerons have frozen in position.
options.d: The increased air density means insufficient thrust is being produced to reach V<sub>R</sub>.
